gitignore_issues.detail: .gitignore does not contain entries for .env, .env.local, .env.production, or similar environment variable files. If a .env file is created with real credentials during future backend integration, it could be accidentally committed.

findings.detail: No backend API layer exists. The project uses mock data exclusively via src/data/*. All API-related references are: (1) api.dicebear.com avatar URLs in mock user data (src/data/users.ts, src/pages/admin/AdminUsers.tsx) — seed-based, no API key required; (2) a single comment in BookingHistory.tsx:16 referencing 'In a real app, this would submit to API'. No fetch, axios, or HTTP client imports found.
findings.note: This is expected for the current stage (mock data + frontend). Documented as graduation project tech debt.

hardcoded_urls.severity: P2 — seed-based, no API key, acceptable for mock data
P2 — public placeholder service, acceptable for mock data
P1 — these are production CDN URLs embedded in source; for a graduation demo this is acceptable, but a real deployment needs an image CDN config via env var

notes: No backend = no real API to hardcode (mock data only).
All external URLs are public CDN image assets (unsplash, picsum, dicebear) — acceptable for frontend-only mock stage.
No localhost:3000 or 127.0.0.1:8080 patterns found in source.

files_with_duplicate_local_utils.detail: Local `formatDate()` duplicates `utils.ts formatDate()`. Migrate to `import { formatDate } from '@/lib/utils'`.
Local `formatDate()` duplicates `utils.ts formatDate()`. Migrate to `import { formatDate } from '@/lib/utils'`.

notes: All 48 source files are imported or used by App.tsx router. Zero orphaned files.
No file exceeds 300 days since last write (oldest = 5 days, tours.ts + utils.ts + useAuthStore.ts + main.tsx).
src/assets/vite.svg is referenced in index.html (not in src grep scope) — not orphaned.
src/lib/utils.ts is used internally by BookingManagement.tsx and SalesBookingDetail.tsx (self + internal use).
Duplicate local formatDate() in two admin pages — candidates for P2 cleanup.
dead_code_audit.priority: P2 — zero orphans, duplicate local util functions worth cleaning up

files_gt_300l.note: Known P2 tech debt in CLAUDE.md — candidate for sub-component extraction
Known P2 tech debt in CLAUDE.md — multi-step form candidate for sub-component extraction

notes: No duplicate filenames across different directories
No orphaned files — all 51 source files are reachable via App.tsx router

unused_deps.reason: Zero import occurrences across all src/ files. All icon work uses @ant-design/icons instead.
Zero import occurrences. motion. directive not used anywhere. Removing this alone should materially reduce the 924 KB bundle.

dep_lt_3_uses.reason: Never imported directly — antd icons are accessed through the antd package (e.g. antd Button, antd Table). No '@ant-design/icons' import string found in any src/ file.
Only used inside src/lib/utils.ts (cn() function). Used exactly once.
Only used inside src/lib/utils.ts (cn() function). Both clsx and tailwind-merge serve the same single-purpose cn() function.

peer_dep_warnings.detail: recharts@3.x may have a peer dep on react@^18.x. Project uses react@^19.2.4. Worth verifying after backend landing when npm install --legacy-peer-deps can be tested.

issues.detail: clsx and tailwind-merge both installed, both only used in src/lib/utils.ts cn(). In a Tailwind v4 project (no @apply), clsx alone is sufficient. tailwind-merge is only needed when merging Tailwind @apply rules. Consolidate to clsx-only to remove one dependency.
924 KB JS bundle (CLAUDE.md tech debt #4). framer-motion (~60 KB gzipped) and lucide-react (~20 KB gzipped) are both unused and can be removed immediately. These two alone should save ~80 KB gzipped.
Cannot verify peer dep conflicts without running npm install. Recommended: npm install --legacy-peer-deps after backend landing to surface any react@19 vs recharts/react@18 conflicts.
